rationale: Single-file edit to `cjb-workflow-health.html` adds three Strategic Pillars overview cards in a CSS grid (`#panel-strategy .pillar-overview`), three Sequencing Guiding Principles blocks (`.guiding` containers titled `Lead with AI to Create the Moat`, `Fix the Foundation to Protect ~$X.XM in Automation Revenue`, `Invest in Trigger Depth & Activation`), and a full `FY27 Phased Roadmap` table laid out as three pillar rows by four quarter columns with `STARTS`/`SHIPS` markers on initiatives (Eventbus migration STARTS in Q2 and SHIPS in Q3, Autonomous setup agent STARTS in Q1 SHIPS in Q2, etc.). The roadmap entries map back to the Initiative Details table that remains intact below the new section. The accompanying CSS rules (`#panel-strategy .pillar-card`, `.guiding`, `.q-header`, `.sub-label`) are scoped to the strategy panel and do not affect other pages. Pure HTML content addition matching the PR body claims, no test or build changes needed.
